overview: OpenCC could be made to crash if it received specially crafted input.
description:
It was discovered that OpenCC incorrectly handled truncated UTF-8 input.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause OpenCC to crash,
resulting in a denial of service.

 

 

 

It was discovered that OpenCC incorrectly handled truncated UTF-8 input.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause OpenCC to crash,
resulting in a denial of service.
full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7972-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7972-1: OpenCC vulnerability

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
21 January 2026

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
OpenCC could be made to crash if it received specially crafted input.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.10

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 opencc - simplified-traditional Chinese conversion library
 

 

 
Details

 

 

It was discovered that OpenCC incorrectly handled truncated UTF-8 input.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause OpenCC to crash,
resulting in a denial of service.

 

 

 

It was discovered that OpenCC incorrectly handled truncated UTF-8 input.
An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause OpenCC to crash,
resulting in a denial of service.

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.10

questing

 libopencc1.1 – 

1.1.9+ds1-2ubuntu0.1

 opencc – 

1.1.9+ds1-2ubuntu0.1

 

 24.04

LTS noble

 libopencc1.1 – 

1.1.7+ds1-1ubuntu0.1

 opencc – 

1.1.7+ds1-1ubuntu0.1

 

 22.04

LTS jammy

 libopencc1.1 – 

1.1.3+ds1-3ubuntu3.1

 opencc – 

1.1.3+ds1-3ubuntu3.1

 

Reduce your security exposure

 

 Ubuntu Pro provides ten-year security coverage to 25,000+ packages in Main and Universe repositories, and it is free for up to five machines.
 

 

 Get Ubuntu Pro
